name: Rahul Bijarnia
campus: Amity School of Engineering and Technology, Noida
my_twin: If I had a personal digital twin, it would track how I solve coding problems and build systems—like where I make repeated mistakes, how I handle debugging, and how efficient my solutions are. It would help me improve my problem-solving over time, similar to how I refine my approach in projects, and also track how I manage responsibilities and collaborate in teams to become more effective.
